Outdated business broadband? Stop compromising on business outcomes.

Start taking your business where you want with nationwide 5G Business Internet on America’s largest 5G network.

Delivered via 5G cellular network; speeds vary due to factors affecting cellular networks. Not available in all areas; addresses may be eligible for 5G or 4G LTE.

Discover Business Internet plans for small and medium businesses under 1,000 employees.

Learn more

Enterprise broadband that supports critical business applications. 

Seamlessly connect your people and locations with enterprise-grade fixed wireless.

  • Enjoy reliable connectivity.

    Take advantage of nationwide coverage that is available even in hard-to-reach locations.

  • Leverage a single vendor.

    Get everything you need—America’s largest 5G network, integrated security, and more.

  • Expect speedy installation.

    Easy to deploy for standing, transitional, or temporary locations.

  • Work with predictable costs.

    Take variation out of the equation with an affordable 5G fixed wireless monthly plan.

See how 5G Business Internet meets
your needs.

Large office? Multiple locations? Security concerns? Take our short self-assessment to learn how your company can benefit from 5G Business Internet. 

Find your fit
Delivered via cellular network; speeds vary due to factors affecting cellular networks.

Business Internet starting at $70.

Take your organization to the next level with affordable connectivity on an award-winning 5G network built for business.

Have more than one business location?  to get the best options for your business. Looking for T-Mobile Home Internet? Check availability.

Business Internet is available at your address!

If you're new to T-Mobile for Business, select New Customer. If you're already a T-Mobile for Business customer, select Existing Customer to login to your account and shop Business Internet.

Existing Customer
New Customer

Business Internet starting at $60.

During congestion, customers on this plan may notice speeds lower than other customers and further reduction if using >1.2TB/mo., due to data prioritization. Not available in all areas; addresses ineligible for 5G may be eligible for 4G LTE. $35 device connection charge due at sale. Plus taxes & fees for accounts currently paying for a T-Mobile wireless line with additional taxes & fees: Regulatory Programs & Telco Recovery Fees totaling up to $2.10 per line, and federal and local surcharges apply. See Broadband Facts at T-Mobile.com. Credit approval required. For use only at location provided at activation. When included, return gateway undamaged or pay up to $750. Video streaming resolution depends on available speeds. For best performance, leave video streaming applications at their default resolution setting. Not compatible with some live TV streaming services. Security and productivity filtering blocks select content. See Sales Rep or T-Mobile.com/filtering for content filtering options and details. Coverage not available in some areas. Network Management: Service may be slowed, suspended, terminated, or restricted for misuse, abnormal use, interference with our network or ability to provide quality service to other users. See T-Mobile.com/OpenInternet for details. See Terms and Conditions (including arbitration provision) at www.T-Mobile.com for additional information.

    See how they compare , opens in a new window

  • Streamline network management.

    Stop hunting for information. With T-Platform, you’ll have everything you need to empower your decision making—all on a single dashboard.

  • Discover the features

Connect locations on demand and maintain business continuity on our nationwide network.

Unmatched 5G reach.

Connect your locations across the country with a trusted provider. With our nationwide coverage, even underserved areas can enjoy reliable 5G connectivity.

Enterprise-grade solution.

Deliver connectivity on-demand with  our flexible and scalable solution. Quickly connect sites and avoid costly infrastructure buildouts.

Business continuity.

Keep your locations and critical applications online during outage events.

IDC SPOTLIGHT REPORT:

How businesses make fixed wireless broadband a reality.

Discover how businesses can deliver reliable, cost-effective connectivity at scale using fixed wireless broadband on a robust 5G network.

Get the report , opens in a new window

Expand business internet options with 5G fixed wireless.

Get 5G fixed wireless access with enterprise-grade connectivity—even in areas challenged by a lack of reliable availability.

View the brief , opens in a new window

Assessing fixed wireless access for connectivity.

Enhance business agility and operational resilience—and adapt to the future of connectivity—with 5G fixed wireless access.

Read the report , opens in a new window

Control business costs with fixed wireless access.

Fixed wireless access is a cost-effective option for organizations that want to streamline connectivity across distributed locations.

Read the analysis , opens in a new window

Got questions?

T-Mobile Business Internet features and benefits.

  • T-Mobile Business Internet provides fast, wireless internet for enterprises using the expansive T-Mobile 5G and LTE network. It delivers a plug-and-play solution with fast setup, flexible installation, and consistent performance—ideal for primary or backup connectivity.

  • Yes, T-Mobile Business Internet is powered by America’s largest 5G network. Businesses benefit from fast, low-latency connections that are ideal for modern workloads, including cloud-based applications, video conferencing, and remote collaboration.

  • T-Mobile delivers enterprise-grade reliability through a nationwide network with intelligent routing and failover options. Coverage includes urban, suburban, and many rural areas, with performance monitoring and business-class uptime commitments.

  • Unlike traditional wired broadband, T-Mobile Business Internet offers faster deployment, flexible hardware options, and the agility of wireless connectivity—backed by T-Mobile 5G leadership and cost-effective pricing.

  • Deployments are fast and flexible, with many enterprise clients able to set up service within days thanks to plug-and-play hardware, remote provisioning, and expert installation support.

  • Yes, T-Mobile is an excellent choice for pop-up or temporary internet service. With portable wireless gateways and flexible data plans, businesses can quickly deploy fast connectivity for events, seasonal locations, or short-term projects—no wired installation required.

Advanced connectivity solutions for enterprises.

  • T-Mobile commercial wireless internet delivers fast, reliable connectivity for enterprises of all sizes. It offers flexible installation, scalable bandwidth, and robust performance, making it ideal for dynamic business environments that need dependable wireless access without the limitations of traditional wired solutions.

  • T-Mobile Enterprise Internet offers centralized network management, scalable connectivity, and secure networking for organizations with multiple offices, campuses, or branches—making it easy to connect, monitor, and manage all sites from a single platform.

  • Yes. T-Mobile enterprise connectivity solutions include advanced Wi-Fi systems, mesh networking, and managed access points to help ensure consistent, high-performance coverage throughout every floor and area of large facilities.

  • T-Mobile enterprise internet solutions are designed to deliver seamless coverage across multi-floor offices and distributed locations. With advanced wireless networking, mesh systems, and centralized management, your business can help ensure consistent, high-performance internet throughout every workspace.

  • T-Mobile provides internet solutions for remote employees such as secure mobile hotspots, flexible wireless plans, and remote access tools, enabling employees to connect seamlessly and remain productive whether working from home, on the road, or at client sites.

  • T-Mobile delivers specialized connectivity solutions for high-demand environments, including IoT integration, ruggedized equipment, and private wireless networks to support automation, inventory management, and real-time data access.

Enterprise-level tools, compliance, and support.

  • Absolutely. The T-Mobile secure enterprise internet meets industry standards such as HIPAA, PCI-DSS, and GDPR, offering advanced encryption, private networking, and compliance support for sensitive data and mission-critical applications.

  • T-Mobile offers robust failover and business internet backup options that automatically switch to wireless internet if your primary connection is disrupted, supporting uninterrupted operations and disaster recovery plans.

  • Enterprise customers have access to the T-Mobile for Business portal, real-time network analytics, centralized device management, and remote troubleshooting tools for maximum control and visibility.

  • T-Mobile offers integrated IoT connectivity solutions tailored for enterprises. With low-latency 5G, scalable bandwidth, and custom SIM management, businesses can connect smart devices, monitor assets, and power data-driven operations seamlessly.

  • T-Mobile knows how to integrate business internet with cloud services seamlessly. Our enterprise internet solutions are designed to integrate with your current IT systems, cloud platforms, and security protocols, helping to ensure compatibility and ease of deployment.

  • Enterprise clients benefit from dedicated account management, 24/7 technical support, and tailored service-level agreements (SLAs) to address the unique needs of large organizations.

  • Yes, T-Mobile provides managed guest Wi-Fi solutions that allow businesses to offer secure, separate internet access for visitors. With customizable login options and network segmentation, managed guest Wi-Fi ensures both convenience for guests and protection for your internal business systems.

  • T-Mobile provides enterprise-grade tools for data usage management and monitoring across teams and locations. Administrators can set usage alerts, view real-time analytics, and implement data policies through the centralized business portal to ensure optimal performance and cost control.

Get started with a demo today.

855-761-8424

During congestion, customers on this plan may notice speeds lower than other customers and further reduction if using >1.2TB/mo., due to data prioritization. Not available in all areas; addresses may be eligible for 5G or 4G LTE. $35 device connection charge due at sale. Plus taxes & fees for accounts currently paying for a T-Mobile wireless line with additional taxes & fees: Regulatory Programs & Telco Recovery Fees totaling up to $2.10 per line, and federal and local surcharges apply. See Broadband Facts at T-Mobile.com. Credit approval required. For use only at location provided at activation. When included, return gateway undamaged or pay up to $750. Video streaming resolution depends on available speeds. For best performance, leave video streaming applications at their default resolution setting. Not compatible with some live TV streaming services. Coverage not available in some areas. Network Management: Service may be slowed, suspended, terminated, or restricted for misuse, abnormal use, interference with our network or ability to provide quality service to other users. See T-Mobile.com/OpenInternet for details. See Terms and Conditions (including arbitration provision) at www.T-Mobile.com for additional information.

Reliable: Based on T-Mobile analysis of eligible customer speed data reflecting consistent download speeds of at least 25 Mbps. Delivered via 5G cellular network; speeds vary due to factors affecting cellular networks. See T-Mobile.com/OpenInternet for additional details.
